title: A5 Derivation Attempt from Selberg Axioms

route.object: A5 Derivation Attempt via Selberg Class Axioms
route.target_statement: A5 (Off-Line Barrier): For f with ET=∞ and g with ET=3, f - g cannot be globally analytic with ET < ∞.

selberg_axioms_used.S1_dirichlet_series: L(s) = Σ a_n n^{-s}, converges for Re(s)>1
selberg_axioms_used.S2_analytic_continuation: Meromorphic continuation to ℂ with pole at s=1
selberg_axioms_used.S3_functional_equation: Λ(s) = ε · Λ̄(1-s): symmetry about σ=1/2

derivation_route.step_1: From S3 (functional equation): L(s) satisfies symmetry s ↔ 1-s. This is a global constraint impossible for ET-finite elementary functions without the specific Γ-factor structure.
derivation_route.step_2: From S4 (Euler product): L(s) = exp(Σ_p log F_p(p^{-s})). This Euler product is a convergent infinite EML sum — ET=∞ in isolation. The complete L(s) = EML-3 by ECL (T112).
derivation_route.step_3: Suppose f = (EML-∞ object) - L(s) has ET < ∞. Then f + L(s) = EML-∞ object has ET < ∞ — contradiction with T184 if depth(f) + depth(L) > depth(f+L) violates tropical semiring bounds.
derivation_route.step_4: Tropical depth inequality: depth(f-g) ≥ |depth(f) - depth(g)|. If depth(f)=∞ and depth(g)=3: depth(f-g) ≥ ∞-3 = ∞. This requires proving the tropical ABSOLUTE VALUE inequality for EML depth — which is a candidate derivation of A5.

route.progress: PARTIAL: Step 4 reduces A5 to the tropical absolute value inequality. This inequality holds for tropical polynomials by Kapranov's theorem. Extension to infinite EML expressions (Selberg class) requires additional work. Status: A5 is likely derivable from tropical + Selberg but not yet complete.

analysis.verdict: A5 partially derived: reduces to tropical absolute value inequality. Full derivation requires Kapranov extension to infinite EML series.
analysis.theorem: T191: A5 Partial Derivation — tropical absolute value route identified

key_theorem: T191: A5 Partial Derivation (S470). Route identified: tropical absolute value inequality ≥ |depth(f)-depth(g)|. Holds for tropical polynomials (Kapranov). Extension to infinite Selberg L-series = remaining gap. Partial progress: A5 reduces to a tractable tropical geometry question.
rabbit_hole_log: Selberg axioms → functional equation → global EML structure constraint
Step 4: depth(f-g) ≥ |depth(f)-depth(g)| for tropical absolute value
Kapranov: tropical polynomial absolute value holds
Extension to infinite EML series = remaining technical gap
T191: A5 partial derivation — tropical absolute value route
